error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Weather Risk Bridge service. On Home Assistant OS, use the discovered http://172.30.x.x:8099 app IP (or http://HOME_ASSISTANT_HOST_IP:8099). The weather-risk-bridge hostname often does not resolve.

user.title: Weather Risk Bridge
user.description:
Connect to the Weather Risk Bridge service and set the US location to track.

Service URL: leave the auto-filled value when present (http://172.30.x.x:8099 on Home Assistant OS). That Supervisor app IP is correct. If the field is empty, try http://HOME_ASSISTANT_HOST_IP:8099. The hostname http://weather-risk-bridge:8099 often does not resolve and will fail with no app log lines.

Latitude / Longitude: decimal degrees (US west longitudes are negative).

Label: friendly name such as Home (becomes the entity slug).

US locations only (NWS/SPC).

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Weather Risk Bridge
reconfigure.description: Update the service connection and latitude/longitude. Keep a discovered http://172.30.x.x:8099 app IP when present.

init.title: Weather Risk Bridge options
init.description: Update the service connection and latitude/longitude. Keep a discovered http://172.30.x.x:8099 app IP when present.
